news.title: EU Orders Google to Give Rival AI Assistants Same New Android Access as Gemini Under Antitrust Rules
news.description: The EU has ordered Google to open Android to rival AI assistants and share search data with competitors, aiming to enhance competition and innovation under the Digital Markets Act.
